content.claim: Hungary's secondary school network comprises 880 schools designed to ensure geographic proximity to secondary general education, with public transport access within one hour stated as a policy aim, though this 'under one hour' standard has not been verified specifically for 6- and 8-year gimnazium provision, which is spatially rarer than 4-year tracks.
content.context: Fresh live research through the School network planning lens
limitations: The one-hour accessibility standard is a stated policy aim rather than independently verified travel-time data
Verification is not disaggregated for the 6-/8-year track subset specifically
No current GPS-based travel-time audit of rural 6-/8-year track accessibility is cited
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
